title: App Settings - General - User stays logged in after restating the app
scenario: User remains logged into account after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe whether the user is still logged in.
7. If the device has passcode or Face ID enabled, check whether a passcode or Face ID prompt appears.
expected: The user remains logged into their account after restarting the app. If the device has passcode or Face ID enabled, a passcode or Face ID prompt appears before accessing the app.
